nasb.text: The Lord your God has multiplied you, and behold, you are this day like the stars of heaven in number.

esv.text: The Lord your God has multiplied you, and behold, you are today as numerous as the stars of heaven.

cnv.text: 耶和華你們的　神使你們多起來；你們看，你們今日像天上的星那樣多。

ccb.text: 因为你们的上帝耶和华使你们人丁兴旺，以致今天人数多如天上的星星。
